name: DUA enhancement to meet threshold
prompt: Evolve a teacher guide for Lengua y Literatura 5to grado Unit 1. The guide has 3 activities. Activity 1.1 has 1 DUA adaptation (a visual diagram — representation only). Activity 1.2 has 0 DUA adaptations. Activity 1.3 has 2 adaptations (choice of task — engagement, and oral response option — action/expression). Enhance DUA to meet the 2+ threshold for all activities.
expected_behavior: Identifies Act 1.1 as below threshold (1 adaptation, 1 principle)
Identifies Act 1.3 as compliant (2 adaptations, 2 principles)
Adds at least 1 concrete adaptation to Act 1.1 from a different DUA principle
Adds at least 2 concrete adaptations to Act 1.2 across 2 DUA principles
Produces DUA Enhancement Summary table with before/after counts
Every added adaptation is specific and actionable (not 'use visual resources')

name: Rubric descriptor refinement from vague to observable
prompt: Evolve the rubric in a teacher guide. Current rubric for indicator I.LENG.5.1.1 has these descriptors: Inicio: 'No logra el objetivo', En proceso: 'Logra parcialmente el objetivo', Adquirido: 'Logra satisfactoriamente el objetivo'. Review feedback says all descriptors are vague and not observable. Rewrite with observable behaviors.
expected_behavior: Replaces 'No logra' with specific observable behavior (e.g., count-based or action-based)
Replaces 'Logra parcialmente' with specific threshold (e.g., '2-3 of 5 elements')
Replaces 'Logra satisfactoriamente' with full achievement descriptor with quality indicator
Each level is clearly distinguishable from the others by observable criteria
Produces Rubric Updates table with before/after for each level

name: Indicator coverage preservation during evolution
prompt: Evolve a teacher guide. Feedback recommends removing the rubric criterion for indicator I.LENG.5.2.1 because 'it overlaps with I.LENG.5.1.2.' However, I.LENG.5.2.1 is a distinct indicator in the Matriz A&S that measures a different learning outcome. Handle this situation without losing indicator coverage.
expected_behavior: Detects that removing the rubric criterion would orphan indicator I.LENG.5.2.1
Does NOT blindly follow the feedback recommendation
Explains why the indicators are distinct despite apparent overlap
Proposes alternative: refine the rubric criterion to reduce overlap while preserving coverage
Or: defers the removal with documented rationale citing indicator coverage requirement
Runs indicator coverage verification showing all indicators remain covered
